devdoc.details: Facet #8: Callbacks (to execute actions after receiving median price from price aggregator)

AccessControlUpdated(address,uint8,bool).details: Emitted when access control is updated for an account

params.access: whether role is granted or revoked

CounterTradeCollateralReturned((address,.details: Emitted when excess counter trade collateral is returned to trader

params.collateralReturned: collateral amount returned to trader (collateral precision)

FeesProcessed(uint8,address,uint256,uint.details: Emitted when a trade's fees are processed

GTokenFeeCharged(address,uint8,uint256).details: Emitted when gToken fee is charged

GTokenOcFeeCharged(address,uint8,uint256.details: Emitted when gToken OC fee is charged

GnsOtcFeeCharged(address,uint8,uint256).details: Emitted when GNS otc fee is charged

GovFeeCharged(address,uint8,uint256).details: Emitted when gov fee is charged

Initialized(uint8).details: Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized.

params.isIncrease: true if leverage increased, false if decreased
params.values: useful values (new collateral, new leverage, liq price, gov fee collateral)

params.isIncrease: true if increase leverage, false if decrease

LimitExecuted((address,uint32),address,u.details: Emitted when a limit/stop order is executed

params.amountSentToTrader: the final amount of collateral sent to the trader
params.collateralPriceUsd: the price of the collateral in USD (1e8 precision)
params.exactExecution: true if guaranteed execution was used
params.marketPrice: the price at which the trade was executed (1e10 precision)
params.oraclePrice: the oracle price without spread/impact (1e10 precision)
params.orderId: the id of the corresponding pending trigger order
params.orderType: the type of the pending order
params.triggerCaller: the address that triggered the limit order

MarketCloseCanceled((address,uint32),add.details: Emitted when a pending market close order is canceled

params.index: index of the trade for trader
params.orderId: order id of the pending market close order

MarketExecuted((address,uint32),address,.details: Emitted when a market order is executed (open/close)

params.amountSentToTrader: the final amount of collateral sent to the trader
params.collateralPriceUsd: the price of the collateral in USD (1e8 precision)
params.marketPrice: the price at which the trade was executed (1e10 precision)
params.open: true for a market open order, false for a market close order
params.oraclePrice: the oracle price without spread/impact (1e10 precision)
params.orderId: the id of the corresponding pending market order

MarketOpenCanceled((address,uint32),addr.details: Emitted when a pending market open order is canceled

params.orderId: order id of the pending market open order

PendingGovFeesClaimed(uint8,uint256).details: Emitted when gov fees are claimed for a collateral

params.amountCollateral: the amount of fees claimed (collateral precision)

params.cancelReason: cancel reason if canceled or none if executed
params.long: true for long, false for short
params.values: important values (pnl, new leverage, new collateral, etc.)

params.cancelReason: cancel reason if canceled or none if executed
params.long: true for long, false for short
params.values: important values (new open price, new leverage, new collateral, etc.)

params.isIncrease: true if increase position size, false if decrease

ReferralFeeCharged(address,uint8,uint256.details: Emitted when referral fee is charged

TradeHoldingFeesManuallyRealized((addres.details: Emitted when a trade's holding fees are manually realized

TradeNegativePnlManuallyRealized((addres.details: Emitted when a trade's negative pnl is manually realized

params.existingManuallyRealizedNegativePnlColla: existing manually realized negative pnl in collateral tokens (collateral precision)
params.negativePnlCollateral: current negative pnl in collateral tokens (collateral precision)
params.newManuallyRealizedNegativePnlCollateral: new manually realized negative pnl in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

TradePositivePnlWithdrawn((address,uint3.details: Emitted when positive pnl is claimed on an open trade

params.pnlInputCollateral: input for amount of positive pnl to withdraw (collateral precision)
params.pnlWithdrawnCollateral: final positive pnl withdrawn in collateral tokens (collateral precision)
params.withdrawablePositivePnlCollateral: maximum withdrawable positive pnl in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

TradeValueTransferred(uint8,address,uint.details: Emitted when a trade's value is transferred

params.availableCollateralInDiamond: amount of available collateral in the diamond (collateral precision)
params.collateralSentToTrader: amount of collateral sent to the trader (collateral precision)

TriggerFeeCharged(address,uint8,uint256).details: Emitted when trigger fee is charged

TriggerOrderCanceled((address,uint32),ad.details: Emitted when a pending trigger order is canceled

params.orderId: order id of the pending trigger order
params.orderType: type of the pending trigger order

params.valueP: the % of closing fee going to vault

claimPendingGovFees().details: Claim the pending gov fees for all collaterals

closeTradeMarketCallback(((address,uint3.details: Executes a pending close trade market order

params._a: the price aggregator answer (order id, price, etc.)

decreasePositionSizeMarketCallback(((add.details: Executes a pending decrease position size market order

params._a: the price aggregator answer (order id, price, etc.)

executeTriggerCloseOrderCallback(((addre.details: Executes a pending close trigger order (for tp/sl/liq orders)

params._a: the price aggregator answer (order id, price, etc.)

executeTriggerCloseOrderCallbackDirect((.details: Executes close trigger directly (for tp/sl/liq orders)

params._a: the price aggregator answer (order id, price, etc.)
params._initiator: the address that initiated the trigger execution
params._trade: the trade object to execute the trigger for

executeTriggerOpenOrderCallback(((addres.details: Executes a pending open trigger order (for limit/stop orders)

params._a: the price aggregator answer (order id, price, etc.)

executeTriggerOpenOrderCallbackDirect(((.details: Executes open trigger directly (for limit/stop orders)

params._a: the price aggregator answer (order id, price, etc.)
params._initiator: the address that initiated the trigger execution
params._trade: the trade object to execute the trigger for

getPendingGovFeesCollateral(uint8).details: Returns the current pending gov fees for a collateral index (collateral precision)

hasRole(address,uint8).details: Returns whether an account has been granted a particular role

hasRoles(address,uint8,uint8).details: Returns whether an account has been granted at least one of two roles

increasePositionSizeMarketCallback(((add.details: Executes a pending increase position size market order

params._a: the price aggregator answer (order id, price, etc.)

params._vaultClosingFeeP: the % of closing fee going to vault

params._govEmergencyTimelock: address to be granted emergency timelock role

manualHoldingFeesRealizationCallback(((a.details: Executes a pending holding fees realization

params._a: the price aggregator answer (order id, price, etc.)

manualNegativePnlRealizationCallback(((a.details: Executes a pending negative pnl realization

params._a: the price aggregator answer (order id, price, etc.)

openTradeMarketCallback(((address,uint32.details: Executes a pending open trade market order

params._a: the price aggregator answer (order id, price, etc.)
the price aggregator answer (order id, price, etc.)

setRoles(address[],uint8[],bool[]).details: Updates access control for a list of accounts

updateLeverageCallback(((address,uint32).details: Executes a pending update leverage order

params._a: the price aggregator answer (order id, price, etc.)

updateVaultClosingFeeP(uint8).details: Update the % of closing fee going to vault

params._valueP: the % of closing fee going to vault

validateTriggerCloseOrderCallback((addre.details: Makes close trigger (SL/TP/LIQ) checks like slippage and price impact and returns cancellation reason if any

params._high: the high value of the candle to check (1e10)
params._low: the low value of the candle to check (1e10)
params._open: the open value of the candle to check (1e10)

validateTriggerOpenOrderCallback((addres.details: Makes open trigger (STOP/LIMIT) checks like slippage, price impact, missed targets and returns cancellation reason if any

params._high: the high value of the candle to check (1e10)
params._low: the low value of the candle to check (1e10)
params._open: the open value of the candle to check (1e10)
